analysis.reasoning: Core message: A quotation from the European External Action Service noting that major crises come with warning signs and accelerate existing trends, framed as 'the post-Coronavirus world is here already.' It is a general reflection on crises and trends rather than a claim about EU unity, success, usefulness, leadership, or global role. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not supported; no mention of EU achievements or overcoming obstacles. EU2 (union/unity) – not supported; no reference to solidarity or agreements among member states. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not supported; no policy actions or benefits to EU citizens discussed. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not supported; no claim of EU pioneering regulation or solutions; it’s a broad observation. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not supported; no human rights or democracy messaging. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not supported; no depiction of EU’s external contributions. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed narrative.
